heading: Omitted
label: 1381 to 1382 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 1381, acts , title III, § 381, ; , , related to cotton price adjustment payments with respect to 1937 cotton crop, and to transfer of pledged cotton of 1937 crop to Commodity Credit Corporation. Subsec. (c) of section 1381, which authorized sale of pledged cotton by Commodity Credit Corporation, was repealed by , .Feb. 16, 1938, ch. 3052 Stat. 66Apr. 7, 1938, ch. 107, § 1252 Stat. 204act July 3, 1948, ch. 827, title II, § 202(b)62 Stat. 1255Section 1381a, , , which was not a part of the Agricultural Adjustment Act of 1938, related only to payments for 1937 crops.act June 16, 1938, ch. 464, title I52 Stat. 745Section 1382, , , required the Commodity Credit Corporation to provide for the extension, from , to , of 1937 cotton loan.act Feb. 16, 1938, ch. 30, title III, § 38252 Stat. 67July 31, 1938July 31, 1939
